name: MILESTONE SCIENTIFIC INC.
summary: Milestone Scientific Inc. develops and commercializes proprietary computer-controlled drug delivery systems utilizing its Dynamic Pressure Sensing (DPS) Technology. Core products include the CompuDent/STA Single Tooth Anesthesia System for dental local anesthesia delivery and the CompuFlo Epidural Computer Controlled Anesthesia System for epidural space identification. Products are sold in the U.S., Canada, and over 40 countries, targeting dental and medical markets with disposable handpieces and electro-mechanical fluid delivery instruments.

products.name: CompuDent/STA Single Tooth Anesthesia System
products.description: Computer-controlled local anesthesia delivery system for dental procedures, using The Wand disposable handpiece; used in 95+ million injections globally.

products.name: CompuFlo Epidural Computer Controlled Anesthesia System
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared system enabling real-time quantitative pressure measurement at needle tip for epidural space identification in anesthesia procedures.

products.name: DPS Dynamic Pressure Sensing Technology
products.description: Proprietary core technology platform controlling flow rate and measuring real-time pressure at needle tip; incorporated into both dental and medical products.

products.name: The Wand / SafetyWand
products.description: Single-use disposable injection handpiece used with CompuDent/STA and CompuFlo systems; pencil-grip design for tactile control and bi-directional rotation.
